example.en: How do I get to the beach?
Excuse me, where is the exit?
Is there an ATM near here?

example.he: אני לא מוצא את המלון שלי.

example.en: Can you show me on the map?
I'm not sure. Maybe at nine.
The last bus is at ten.
Do you know a good place?
I want to cancel the order.
One more, please. It was great.
example.he: עוד אחד, בבקשה. זה היה מעולה.

example.en: We want to rent a car.
The market is full of people.
The air conditioning does not work.
The taxi is here. Let's go!
I want to see the menu.
Where do I get the bus?
Good evening! We have a reservation.
The room is up the stairs.
See you later at the hotel.
We want to visit the old city.
Is there a supermarket near here?
How do I get to the beach?
I am here with my family.

example.he: אני אף פעם לא אוכל בשר.

example.en: I am happy to be here.
Can you take a photo of us?
I do not remember the name.
Turn left at the traffic light.
I want to rent a bike.
It is next to the bank.
The children play in the park.
I need coins for the locker.
Can I use my camera here?
I am traveling with a baby.
Where can I wash my hands?
The stairs are on the right.
My computer is in the bag.
I wear a jacket in winter.
Is there a fridge in the room?
The children play with a ball.
We shake hands to say hello.
example.he: אנחנו לוחצים ידיים כדי להגיד שלום.

example.en: The printer is out of paper.
Do you want a plastic bag?
They play billiards at the bar.
No one likes to be the loser.
example.he: אף אחד לא אוהב להיות המפסיד.

example.en: The letter is in the mailbox.
The baby has a teddy bear.
